text: INVESTIGATION STATUS as on 02-02-2026: Case FIR 00188/2025 u/s 379 IPC has been CLOSED. A final report (charge-sheet) was filed before the Hon'ble Court on 11-12-2025 and the matter is now sub-judice for trial. The investigation by this police station is complete. No further investigative action is pending at the station level.

FIRST INFORMATION REPORT. P.S. Saket. FIR No. 00188/2025 u/s 379 IPC. Complainant: Mr. Vikram Singh, mobile 9700112233, Aadhaar 7781 2200 5566, R/o B-12 Saket. Property: one mobile phone snatched on 03-08-2025. Accused arrested and charge-sheeted. IO: ASI Mohan Lal.
